text:
Created attachment 204831
lidarr-0.6.2.883.diff

* Updated version to 0.6.2.883
* Added runtime dependency of chromaprint (fpcalc) for audio-fingerprinting. Reference: https://github.com/Lidarr/Lidarr/wiki/Health-checks#fpcalc-missing
* Updated UIDs and GIDs for conflict resolution from the previous patch for lidarr-0.5.0.583.diff
